title: AJAZZ Control Center trusted publisher list
description: List of Ed25519 public keys whose signed plugin manifests load without a 'self-signed' warning. Shipped as resources/trusted_publishers.json.

version.description: Schema-format version. Bump only when the publisher entry shape changes incompatibly; trust set rotation is in-band (just edit publishers[]).

key.description: Ed25519 public key (32 bytes, base64-encoded — exactly 44 chars including padding).

name.description: Display name shown in the plugin store / details pane.

url.description: Optional link to the publisher's homepage / source repository.

comment.description: Free-form note for maintainers (revocation reason, key rotation history, etc.).
